title: AEP NAMES NESSING CHIEF SUSTAINABILITY OFFICER
text: COLUMBUS, Ohio , March 30, 2022  /PRNewswire/ -- American Electric Power (Nasdaq: AEP) has promoted Sandy Nessing to vice president and chief sustainability officer, effective April 1. Nessing currently is the managing director of Corporate Sustainability and is responsible for leading the company's sustainability and environmental, social and governance (ESG) strategy, corporate stakeholder engagement, and annual sustainability and ESG performance reporting and risk monitoring.

title: Traverse Wind Energy Center Begins Delivering Savings to Customers
text: The 998-MW Traverse project is the largest single wind farm ever built at one time in North America COLUMBUS, Ohio , March 21, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- American Electric Power's (Nasdaq: AEP) 998-megawatt (MW) Traverse Wind Energy Center, the largest single wind farm built at one time in North America and one of the largest wind facilities worldwide, is now providing clean energy to customers in Arkansas, Louisiana and Oklahoma. Traverse is expected to generate 3.8 million megawatt-hours annually for AEP's Public Service Company of Oklahoma (PSO) and Southwestern Electric Power Company (SWEPCO) customers in Oklahoma, Arkansas and Louisiana.

title: The Perfect Balance Between Yield And Growth: American Electric Power
text: American Electric Power offers an above-average yield in its industry and a dividend growth rate close to 6-7% per year.

title: I&M Seeks Detailed Proposals for 1,300 MW of Solar, Wind Energy
text: First Step in Implementing I&M's Powering the Next Tomorrow Plan Clean Energy Facilities Will Begin Generating Electricity as Early as 2024 FORT WAYNE, Ind., March 15, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Indiana Michigan Power, an American Electric Power (Nasdaq: AEP) company, has issued a request for proposals (RFP) for facilities that will generate approximately 800 megawatts (MW) of wind energy and approximately 500 MW of solar power.

title: The War in Ukraine Could Spread: 12 Safe-Haven Dividend Stocks to Buy Now
text: Worrisome commentary has begun. While the threats and headline chatter of a major war breaking out in Europe from the confines of Ukraine are unlikely, they are not impossible.
